## SK Hynix to close $28 billion ADR bookbuild Wednesday following oversubscription

A Wednesday close confirmation via Reuters sets a hard date for price discovery on the ADR — the pricing event will establish the first publicly-traded Western valuation benchmark for SK Hynix, directly relevant for calibrating MU's relative HBM multiple and assessing AI memory demand conviction.

- Three outlets (Reuters, TradingView, Yahoo Finance) confirm SK Hynix is closing its $28 billion ADR bookbuild on Wednesday.
- Wednesday close date is confirmed; oversubscription is cited as the reason for the expedited timeline.
- Reuters sourcing ('source says') provides primary-channel credibility to the closing timeline.
- Multi-outlet convergence on the Wednesday date removes execution uncertainty from the offering.
